---
#title: "Dr. Kadir Jun Ayhan's Website"
#pagetitle: "{{< meta website.title >}}"
#description-meta: "{{< meta website.description >}}"
#main-photo: /profiles/kf_pd_week.png
#main-photo-square: /profiles/kf_pd_week.png
#title-block-banner: "#004440"
format:
  html:
    quarto-template-params:
      banner-header-class: "home"
---

::: {.border style="font-size: 3em"}
I have moved my website to 

[ayhan.phd](https://ayhan.phd).
:::
